cause_analysis.narrative: Hair Counsel churned on 2026-03-12 after 135 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 24-day silence starting 2025-12-13. Classification: competitive switch. The client mentioned an alternative provider before cancelling. 12 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Competitive] Client mentioned a competitor on 2026-02-11 — log this to Product + Sales for competitive positioning work.
[SLA] 12 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
